chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 652 of 2003 C. P. No. S – 1900 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge C. P. No. D-652 of 2003 For directions For hearing of CMA No.78/2009 (C/A) C. P. No. S-1900 of 2016 Hearing of case For hearing of main case 20.02.2024 Mr. Farhan Ali Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner in C. P. No. S-1900 of 2016. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- C. P. No. D-652 of 2003 The record shows that petitioner / applicant, appearing in person, filed the listed application in the year 2009 and since then she has not pursued the same. Therefore, the listed application is dismissed. C. P. No. S-1900 of 2016 Learned Counsel submits that party / petitioner has taken away the file and he has no instructions to proceed with the matter. None is present for the petitioner. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
